name: Glances
short_description: Cross-platform system monitoring tool showing CPU, memory, disk, network, and Docker stats.
description: Glances is a cross-platform system monitor that shows real-time CPU, memory, disk, network, process list, Docker stats, and hardware sensors. It includes a web UI, alerts, InfluxDB export for historical data, and auto-discovery for container metrics.
usecases: Monitor server performance in real-time through the web interface.
Track Docker container resource usage alongside host metrics.
Set up alerts when CPU, memory, or disk exceeds thresholds.
View historical data by exporting to time-series databases.
notes: Requires host PID namespace for full process monitoring
Docker socket mount needed for container stats
Can export to InfluxDB for long-term storage
